Packaging is lightweight plastic, emphasizing portability, and the absence of premium branding suggests a budget-friendly yet functional lifestyle product.

Item Name: WILDE Protein Chips Variety Pack, Buffalo, Nashville Hot, Himalayan Pink Salt, Sea Salt and Vinegar, Thin and Crispy, High Protein, Keto Friendly, Made with Real Ingredients, 2.25oz Bags (Pack of 8)
Bullet Point 1: TRY A FEW WILDE PROTEIN CHIP FLAVORS WITH OUR VARIETY PACK: Contains 2x 2.25oz Buffalo, 2x 2.25oz Nashville Hot, 2x 2.25oz Sea Salt & Vinegar and 2x 2.25oz Himalayan Pink Salt.
Bullet Point 2: MADE WITH SIMPLE INGREDIENTS: WILDE Protein Chips have the crisp and texture of traditional potato chips, but we ditched the potato. Instead, we use real ingredients including chicken breast, egg whites and bone broth.
Bullet Point 3: PACKS A (PROTEIN) PUNCH: WILDE is the perfect high-protein, low-carb snack. Each serving of WILDE Protein Chips has 10g of protein, low net carbs and is keto friendly.
Bullet Point 4: FREE OF COMMON ALLERGENS: WILDE Protein Chips do not contain potato, corn, processed proteins, gluten, grains, dairy, or nuts. They're the perfect protein-packed snack for school lunches and more!
Bullet Point 5: CHIPS GONE WILDE: WILDE is the story of an impossible snack made possible through relentless hustle and never taking no for an answer. That's how we turned 100% all-natural chicken breast, egg whites and bone broth into 7 varieties of crispy, delicious chips to satisfy your cravings. So good, we deserve to be a little cocky.
Bullet Point 6: PERFECTLY SIZED FOR FAMILY SNACKS: Comes with three (3) 2.25oz bags, perfect for sharing (or not).
Product Description: Himalayan Pink Salt, Sea Salt and Vinegar, Nashville Hot, Buffalo Chicken Chips 2.25oz (8 Pack)
Value: 18.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: WILDE Protein Chips are positioned as a health-focused, high-protein snack alternative to traditional potato chips, targeting fitness-conscious and keto-friendly consumers. The variety pack format and individual 2.25 oz bags suggest convenience and portion control, appealing to both individual snackers and family sharing. While the brand emphasizes natural, allergen-free ingredients and Paleo certification, the absence of premium branding or limited-edition claims keeps the product in a mid-to-high-range value segment rather than luxury. The multi-flavor bundle deal enhances perceived value, justifying a price point higher than standard snack chips.
